---
title: "Flux data"
---

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
#| output: FALSE

library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
rds_folder <- "C:/Users/Kaltern/OneDrive - Scientific Network South Tyrol/Plantaditsch_repository - General/Data_dashboard/RDS_objects"

hour_interval <- function(tstamp, int=0.5, digits=0){
  h <- as.character(format(tstamp, "%H:%M")) 
  h2 <- sapply(strsplit(h,":"),
               function(x) {
                 x <- as.numeric(x)
                 x[1]+x[2]/60
               }
  )
  Hour_int  <- round(h2/int, digits)*int
  return(Hour_int)
}

NEE_fingerprint <- readRDS(paste(rds_folder,"NEE_fingerprint.RDS",sep="/"))

NEE_rawplotly <- readRDS(paste(rds_folder,"NEE_rawplotly.RDS",sep="/"))

ET_fingerprint <- readRDS(paste(rds_folder,"ET_fingerprint.RDS",sep="/"))

ET_rawplotly <- readRDS(paste(rds_folder,"ET_rawplotly.RDS",sep="/"))

LE_fingerprint <- readRDS(paste(rds_folder,"LE_fingerprint.RDS",sep="/"))

LE_rawplotly <- readRDS(paste(rds_folder,"LE_rawplotly.RDS",sep="/"))

H_fingerprint <- readRDS(paste(rds_folder,"H_fingerprint.RDS",sep="/"))

H_rawplotly <- readRDS(paste(rds_folder,"H_rawplotly.RDS",sep="/"))

windDir_rawplotly <- readRDS(paste(rds_folder,"windDir_rawplotly.RDS",sep="/"))

diagnostics_tbl_EC <- readRDS(paste(rds_folder,"diagnostics_tbl_EC.RDS",sep="/"))
```
## Row {height=30%}
```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
#| output: TRUE
#| title: Last measurements imported
knitr::kable(
  diagnostics_tbl_EC,
  format="simple",
  digits = 3
  #,caption = "Diagnostics summary for imported logger data tables"
)
```
## Row {height=50%}
### Column {.tabset}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| error: false
#| title: Net Ecosystem Exchange
NEE_rawplotly

```
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: true
#| message: false
#| warning: FALSE
#| error: false
#| title: Fingerprint

suppressWarnings(
print(NEE_fingerprint)
)
```
### Column {.tabset}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| error: false
#| title: Evapotranspiration
ET_rawplotly

```
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: true
#| message: false
#| warning: FALSE
#| error: false
#| title: Fingerprint

suppressWarnings(
print(ET_fingerprint)
)
```
## Row {height=50%}
### Column {.tabset}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| error: false
#| title: Latent Energy
LE_rawplotly

```
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: true
#| message: false
#| warning: FALSE
#| error: false
#| title: Fingerprint

suppressWarnings(
print(LE_fingerprint)
)
```
### Column {.tabset}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| error: false
#| title: Sensible Heat
H_rawplotly

```
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: true
#| message: false
#| warning: FALSE
#| error: false
#| title: Fingerprint

suppressWarnings(
print(H_fingerprint)
)
```
